title: Cavallo Unisex 'Life is Simple' T-Shirt
text: [SHORT DESCRIPTION] Cavallo unisex 'Life is Simple' T-shirt in white, with logo on the arm and chest and eight Cavallo Hoof Boot prints on the back. title: LEB 'Long Ear Boot' (Hoof Boot for Donkeys) - Black (sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo LEB Long Ear Hoof Boot for Donkeys - Black SOLD AS PAIRS ( Donkey-specific sizing - Available in Slim Sole, Sizes D00-D5) Find your in-depth Cavallo LEB User Manual HERE! The Cavallo LEB Long Ear Boot is the first hoof boot made for donkeys. It is secure, durable, breathable, and easy to use. Built from the ground up for donkey anatomy, LEB stands up to rocky trails, muddy pens, transport, and rehab. Carefully developed through collaboration with leading donkey trimmers, farriers, and donkey rescues and hoof care professionals, the Cavallo LEB features a donkey-specific form that supports natural hoof function. The fit protects higher heel bulbs and accommodates a stronger frog. The abrasion-resistant upper with waterproof stitching keeps its shape through water, grit, and repeated use. Drainage ports help donkey hooves stay cool, clean, and dry. Please measure after a fresh trim and use our LEB sizing chart before ordering. The fully adjustable upper allows a close, snug fit on a wide range of donkey hoof shapes. The Cavallo LEB is a hoof care top choice for both everyday use and hoof rehabilitation. It supports donkeys recovering from soreness, abscesses, sole bruising, hoof cracks, and more. LEB is also ideal for transport and for therapy visits on slick indoor floors. Whether your donkey is packing, turned out, or travelling, LEB delivers all-day protection and comf

title: Your Cavallo News - April 2020
h1: What’s your Cavallo Community Up To? April 2020
text: What’s your Cavallo Community Up To? April 2020 Who Said Lockdown Can’t be Cute? At Emma Massingale’s, the little guys are keeping themselves amused in the garden while they’re are all on lockdown! For your daily dose of cuteness you can follow the mini team on Instagram @little_shets Starring Albert, Ernie, Percy…and Luigi! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbs2PwYhjk8 Monty Roberts, The Movement: Update: “At this extraordinary time, we are working through options for the event and will provide details as soon as possible. If you have questions, please contact us at info@montyroberts.com . Thank you for your patience and loyalty, and we can’t wait to see you soon.” Trailmeister - What's Up! Trail Workers Keeping Trails Open We Ride Sport & Trail Magazine March 2020 Equaids Magazine UK – March 2020 https://weride-magazine.com/2020/03/08/the-march-2020-issue/ Best of America By Horseback Read the BOABH Feb/March Newsletter HERE! Pure Liberty Training Course Registration Open Early From Andrea Wady, creator of the film Taming Wild – Pura Vida: “We have been contacted by lots of students about the online course. Normally we only open for registration in September (once a year), but we’ve decided to open it up to registration so students who want to study whilst stuck at home, they can. Please know this is not a sales pitch, but I wanted to let you know I am here for you and welcome

title: Your Cavallo News – April 2023
text: Your Cavallo News – April 2023 Win a Cavallo Pad Party Pack It’s your chance to try EVERY Cavallo boot pad! To enter our contest, just leave us a comment on this post, telling us which Cavallo Pad you want to try most for your horse and why! You will automatically be entered in our draw to win a FREE Cavallo Hoof Boot Pad Party Pack! $109.75 USD value! (See contest details at the bottom of the newsletter) Enter Here! Meet Us at Equine Affaire & Horse Expo Canada! HEAR ME SPEAK: I'm a Presenter at Equine Affaire Ohio this Week! It’s an all-star list of presenters this year, including Guy McLean , Julie Goodnight and Jonathan Field ! Where & When? My presentation Not a Vet? Here’s an Easy Insight to Laminitis takes place Friday at 12pm at the Seminar Stage (Voinovich Center), and my second talk, 8 Most Important Horse Care Concerns and How to Handle Them will be on Friday at 5pm in the Demo Ring (Celeste Center). Check out the presenter’s schedule HERE! What Will You Learn? My first talk is tailored to the non-professional horse owner for the prevention, understanding and treatment of Laminitis. Listeners will receive a simple definition of the disease, a list and variety of its causes and a good arsenal of tools to employ should the illness strike. Although Laminitis can inflict merciless agony and is potentially fatal, it is curable with an understanding of realistic and approp

title: Your Cavallo News – April 2024
text: Your Cavallo News – April 2024 2024 Liberty Festival - Brought to you by Cavallo! Cavallo is thrilled to be the TITLE SPONSOR of the 2024 Liberty Festival in Kentucky, taking place from October 10-13. This exciting event is presented by the International Liberty Horse Association. And that’s not all! Guess who will grace the Liberty Festival as a guest star? None other than Heartland’s Amber Marshall, known for her portrayal of the beloved character Amy Fleming. But that’s not all! Cavallo will also be giving away some FREE general admission tickets PLUS a chance to attend a private signing and photo op with Amber Marshall herself ! Stay tuned for announcements in your email. The Liberty Festival promises an unforgettable experience for horse enthusiasts and Heartland fans alike! Find Out More! March's Email List Winner Announced! We love having you here with us, so every month we pick a winner from our list for a free pair of Cavallo Boots – any style! This month’s email list random draw winner is Amber Siler from Douglass, KS! And don’t forget all the other reasons you stay with us… You get the hottest Cavallo PROMOS and new product info FIRST. You also get updates on the rescues, therapy organizations and equestrian groups YOU help, just by being a Cavallo Customer! She has been wearing the boots for over a year now, and they have helped her tremendously as she suffers from chronic Laminitis issues.” -Alexa Tortora of Freedom Ride Equine Inc. title: Your Cavallo News – February 2024
text: Your Cavallo News – February 2024 Will YOU be our next winner? We love having you here with us, so every month we pick a winner from our email list for a free pair of boots – your choice of style and colour! And don’t forget all the other reasons you stay with us… You get the hottest Cavallo promos and new product announcements. You also get updates on rescues, therapy organizations and equestrian groups you’re helping, just by being a Cavallo Customer! This month’s email list winner is Gerald Hendry of Kronau, SK, Canada! Congrats, Gerald! Barefoot Mounted Units Race from Houston to Austin From Amy Blackwelder: “Thanks for sharing my photo. My partner Anson Drake & I loped 1 mile at a time as a team in a relay-style race. Both of our horses are barefoot and were wearing Cavallo boots the whole race! The Montgomery County Sheriff’s Office Mounted Unit proudly participated in the 75th Harris County Sheriff’s Office Pony Express. The Pony Express Ride is a prestigious tradition where horses and riders, mainly from Houston-area law enforcement mounted patrol agencies, travel along U.S. Highway 290 from Waller County Fairgrounds to the State Capital in a relay fashion. Once they reach the Capitol in Austin, riders pass on letters of invitations to elected officials on the steps of the Capitol, marking the beginning of the 92nd Houston Livestock Show and Rodeo.” Rethinking Stall Res

title: Your Cavallo News – January 2024
text: Your Cavallo News – January 2024 WIN A PAIR OF TREK! ANSWER OUR QUICK SURVEY TO WIN 1 OF 6 PAIRS OF TREK BOOTS! Are you willing to share your knowledge with us? If you’re on our list, you’re someone who knows about hoof boots. Here’s your chance to tell us what you like (and don’t like!). We want to hear from you! Take our quick survey to be automatically entered to WIN 1 of 6 pairs of Trek Boots: Take our Survey to WIN! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RziLg5F_iE8 Here's your Cavallo News for January 2024: Why is Equine Therapy So Important? Did you know that a portion of your Cavallo Boot purchase goes toward helping organizations like Tender Little Hearts? Watch this video to find out about the children they are helping. (And also – take in those little chomping noises Maserati makes on the microphone – too cute for words!) Carole Connects with Hoof Enthusiasts in The Aloha State! On the enchanting island of O’Hahu, Hawaii, we sent out a beacon calling in local horse lovers. They answered, loud and clear! We enjoyed presenting to a very engaged audience at our barefoot & booted hoof care event on January 13. Our discussions delved into the intricacies of hoof health and anatomy, exploring ways for horse owners to sidestep common hoof problems. We uncovered the versatile uses of Cavallos and explored the unique needs of our equine companions, including: – The 8 pillars of holi

title: Your Cavallo News – July/August 2023
text: Your Cavallo News – July/August 2023 Make Us Laugh to Win! YOU could end up with a pair of NEW Trek Pro Boots! Just go to our Facebook post HERE and tell us the lengths YOUR horse would go to for a pair of Trek Pro. The comment that makes us laugh the most will get the boots! (* PLEASE NOTE – we will NEVER send you a message with a link to click under any circumstances, please be careful of fraudulent messages regarding this and any contest. Please see details at bottom of this newsletter) Can a Pony Publish a Book? If He's the MAYOR, he Sure Can! The English town of Cockington is very proud of its furry, four-legged mayor! Last year, Patrick was officially elected mayor of Cockington after their previous mayor passed away. While Patrick doesn’t rule with a gavel and he hates paperwork, he does provide the public with equine therapy and, like many mayors, he’s great company at the pub and likes a pint or two. ???? Patrick (with the help of his owners, Kirk & Wendy), has been working on a beautiful book called How a Pony Became Mayor, all about his journey to being elected. Please keep an eye out, we will announce once Patrick’s book is released! What a perfect gift for the horse lover or animal loving child in your life!
